error: Compile failed because SqrtScalar was const while accessing TBuf::Get, and invTotalSamples used an explicit static_cast<float>(uint32_t) expression rejected by AICore.
summary: Fix AscendC compile errors by making helper functions that access TBuf non-const and replacing explicit static_cast<float>(uint32_t) in AICore code with pure floating-point arithmetic for invTotalSamples.
